description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Softbiz Resource Repository Script 1.1 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) sbres_id parameter in (a) details_res.php, (b) refer_friend.php, and (c) report_link.php, and (2) the sbcat_id parameter in (d) showcats.php.
